name: Pickled Eggs (Basic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard boil eggs.
2. Slice onions very thinly.
3. Combine water and vinegar in a large container.
4. Stir well.
5. Peel the eggs and layer them in the jar with sliced onions and peppers.
6. Cover the jar.
7. Let marinate on the counter. Do not refrigerate.
8. The eggs will become spicier the longer they are left in the marinade. Minimum time is about one week; maximum time is as long as you wish.
9. When the eggs no longer need to be marinated, remove them from the jar and place them in a container without any liquid.
